chunks.text:
America One Electric LLC — Honest and dependable electricians serving the Dallas-Fort Worth Metroplex. Services:
- Residential electrical services
- Commercial electrical services
- Electrical repairs
- Installations

Contact Information:
- Phone: (214) 501-3869
- Email: mendoza@americaoneelectric. com
- Address: 222 Garvon St, Garland, TX 75040
- Website: https://americaoneelectric. com/
- Service Area: Dallas-Fort Worth Metroplex and surrounding areas

Rating: 5 stars with 58 reviews.
